summary: All US-017 tests were already implemented and passing. Verified: 30 Vitest snapshot tests (generateSite pipeline with 5 seeds, generateMetadata 3×3 combos, generateName 3×3 combos, selectTheme 5 eras + mapping check) and 4 Playwright smoke tests (first load without seed, first load with seed, refresh button flow, share-link reproduction). All CI scripts pass: lint, typecheck, test, test:e2e.
